texts.full_text: and widower, Robin, who unknowingly shares what he thinks is unrequiteHere are the completed summaries: Summary EF AU: Forbidden fruit, delicious, tempting, and completely out of bounds for touching. That's what Princess Emma of the White Kingdom was to outsiders, but as the tale goes, someone always takes a bite and things go sour. Only no one ever expected that someone to be the very same dragon her parents screwed over exactly eighteen years ago. The dragon, named Tharros, had been a prisoner of war, and Emma's parents had used him as a pawn in their game of power. But now, Tharros had escaped, and Emma was faced with the consequences of her family's actions. As she gazed into his piercing eyes, she felt a spark of recognition, and her heart began to question everything she thought she knew about her family's past. Little did she know, Tharros had secrets of his own, and their encounter would set off a chain of events that would change the course of their lives forever. Summary Mal had every thing she had ever wanted, a daughter who she loved and adored, a career that she enjoyed, but something seemed to be missing. But things start to change one night when a little foster child shows up on her doorstep. The child, a shy and timid girl named Lily, had been living on the streets, and Mal's heart melted at the sight of her. As she took Lily in, Mal began to realize that she had been so focused on her career and
